message_list_observation: Use the visible chat list as the message list equivalent.
Only include test contacts explicitly authorized by the user.
thread_observation: Ignore any history before the user's explicit start marker.
latest_inbound_messages must contain only messages after the latest user outbound inside the test window.
stage_send_verification: Mac WeChat can usually accept clipboard paste directly.
Verify staged text before pressing Enter or clicking send.

draft_staging.verification: Host must compare the staged text visually before pressing Enter or clicking Send.

post_send_verification: Record succeeded only after the outbound bubble appears.
known_gui_pitfalls: Desktop chat history may expose unrelated personal history; respect the declared test boundary.
